notes: CodificationSection, , in part, , related to reports to Congressional appropriations committees on Colorado River dam funds, was from the Interior Department Appropriation Act, 1950, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts. Similar provisions were contained in , .act Oct. 12, 1949, ch. 680, title I, § 10163 Stat. 784act June 29, 1948, ch. 754, § 162 Stat. 1130
